text:
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is correctly titled, but it is authored solely by Scott Mueller; Judea Pearl is not an author of this specific work. As this is a case of an incorrect author attribution rather than a complete hallucination of a non-existent paper, it is classified as unlikely to be an AI hallucination.
LINK: https://doi.org/10.1515/jci-2021-0026
FOUND_TITLE: Personalized decision making–a conceptual introduction
FOUND_AUTHORS: Scott Mueller
FOUND_YEAR: 2022
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
